title: Happy Birthday Bowls, 7pk Dessert Treat Cups Bowls Party Supplies for Birthday
description: Got a party that involves ice-cream? Or maybe you want to play it safe with a bowl rather than a plate? This pack of 7, happy birthday themed, party bowls are the perfect size for cake, ice-cream and all things foody at the brithday party. Lightweight and easy to post, these are perfect for posting and distributing.
